Investors are eagerly awaiting the announcement, hoping for Redwire to exceed these projections and deliver positive news. For more details, the full report can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.summary: The US Postal Service reported a controllable loss of $848 million for the second quarter of fiscal year 2025, compared to $317 million for the same period last year. The net loss for the quarter was $3.3 billion, an increase from $1.5 billion last year. The losses were due to non-controllable factors like workers' compensation adjustments and higher expenses. Despite this, total operating revenue remained steady at $19.7 billion. First-Class Mail revenue increased by 1.0%, while Shipping and Packages revenue increased by 0.7%. Marketing Mail revenue decreased by 1.4%. Total operating expenses were $23.1 billion, up by 8.3% from last year. The Postal Service is working to control costs, increase revenues, and modernize infrastructure to achieve financial sustainability. They have saved $116 million in transportation costs and 10 million work hours through their strategic plan. The plan aims to innovate, grow revenue, work efficiently, and uphold their universal service mission.
news.headline: USPS Q2 FY 2025: Controllable loss at $848M, net loss $3.3B, total revenue $19.7B, incurring $1.8B expenses. Major factors include non-cash workers' comp adjustments & volume declines in mail categories. Delivery network efficiencies & growth noted, strategic plan saving costs.

news.summary: Following the first quarter results of Hut 8 Corp. (NASDAQ: HUT), analysts have maintained their rating and price forecast. The company reported an EPS of $(1.30), falling below the estimated $(0.24), while sales were $21.82 million, missing the estimated $33.28 million. Analyst Mike Colonnese from H.C. Wainwright & Co. kept a Buy rating with a price target of $25. Despite the weak results, Hut 8’s stock rose by 12% on positive updates regarding their High-Performance Computing (HPC)/AI colocation pipeline. Colonnese noted the company's shift to an energy infrastructure platform, with a 2.6 GW HPC/AI pipeline, which could lead to a re-rating upon securing stable HPC contracts. The analyst also expressed optimism about the company's legacy mining (American Bitcoin) and future prospects.
news.headline: Analysts bullish on Hut 8 despite Q1 miss; EPS at $(1.30), sales $21.82M (est. $33.28M). Stock up 12% on HPC/AI bets. Buy rating, $25 target.

The development is projected to create thousands of jobs and generate millions in revenue for the region. Legislators and supervisors underscore the essential role of the project in driving economic development and expansion.
news.headline: Kern County leaders endorse Tejon's Board for economic growth.Important for development.

news.summary: The Hong Kong Monetary Authority has revealed plans to conduct a tender for 10-year RMB Institutional Government Bonds, with an allotted total amount of RMB1.0 billion. This tender is scheduled for May 13, 2025.
news.headline: Hong Kong set to auction 10-year RMB Institutional Govt Bonds totaling RMB1.0 billion on May 13, 2025.

news.summary: Hong Kong Monetary Authority has revealed its plan to issue RMB 1.5 billion worth of 2-year government bonds on May 13, 2025, under the Infrastructure Bond Programme. The upcoming tender presents an opportunity for investors looking to participate in this initiative.
news.headline: Hong Kong to auction RMB 1.5B gov't bonds on May 13, 2025, under Infrastructure Bond Programme.

news.summary: At the recent Chainalysis Links conference, it was discussed that Ripple's XRP Ledger is transforming DeFi payments by pioneering stablecoin advancements and practical financial use cases. The conference highlighted the significant impact of XRP Ledger in the DeFi space.
news.headline: XRP Ledger redefines DeFi payments with stablecoin tech, real-world finance apps - as discussed at Chainalysis Links event.

news.summary: Chaska, MN - Today, Mike Lindell Media Corporation (OTC: MLMC) announced the appointment of attorney Daniel J. Eastman as General Counsel. With over 35 years of legal and regulatory experience, Mr. Eastman will oversee the Company's legal affairs, corporate governance, and risk management strategies amid increased litigation activity and industry scrutiny. His background includes roles as an SEC legal staff intern, state securities regulator, and corporate lawyer with expertise in Federal and state securities law compliance and securities fraud defense. Mr. Eastman has served as CEO, board member, and provided counsel on numerous financial restructurings. Known for his adept handling of legal crises and enhancing corporate compliance in dynamic environments, he brings a wealth of experience to his new role.
news.headline: New General Counsel Daniel J. Eastman appointed by Mike Lindell Media Corp. (OTC: MLMC), with over 35 years of legal experience.

news.summary: In the past week, U.S. homebuyers and refinancers made a strong return, capitalizing on slightly reduced interest rates ahead of the Federal Reserve's upcoming policy decision. The Mortgage Bankers Association (MBA) revealed that total mortgage applications surged by 11% for the week ending May 2, rebounding sharply from the 4.2% decrease observed in the previous week. This spike, one of the largest in 2025, indicates a significant revival in housing market momentum despite conflicting economic indicators. The average 30-year fixed mortgage rate for conforming loan balances, which are $806,500 or lower, dropped from 6.89% to 6.84% during this period. This slight decline led to a surge in demand, with purchase applications and refinancing both increasing by 11%. Compared to the previous year, refinancing volumes have soared by 51%, showcasing a remarkable turnaround from subdued activity in the past few months.
news.headline: MBA reports 11% spike in mortgage applications, with total applications increasing and 30-year fixed rate dropping to 6.84%.

news.summary: The Treasury secretary encouraged business leaders and innovators to focus on factors beyond the previous administration's trade policies.
news.headline: Investors should bank on Trump's economic plan, says Scott Bessent, Treasury secretary urges looking past trade agenda. #Finance #Economy

news.summary: On May 7, 2025, in Rochester, NY, Syntec Optics Holdings, Inc. (Nasdaq: OPTX) revealed its support in developing non-incisional optics for improving near vision. With a focus on defense, biomedical, communications, and consumer sectors, the company aims to address refractive errors, a prevalent issue impacting an estimated 128 million individuals in the United States. This move signifies a promising market potential for efficient solutions in treating this common age-related vision problem.
news.headline: Syntec Optics (OPTX) will develop non-incisional optics for near vision correction, targeting 128 million affected in the US.

news.summary: The president aims to revitalize American manufacturing and boost its previous success, despite the challenges posed by economic history cycles.
news.headline: Can Trump revive US manufacturing? He aims to reverse economic trends, but history suggests a tough challenge.

news.summary: The Federal Reserve is expected to keep interest rates steady at 4.25%-4.50% for the third straight meeting. Jerome Powell's messaging during his press conference is crucial, especially regarding trade-related developments and potential inflationary pressures from new tariffs announced by President Trump. The first quarter of 2025 saw strong labor market and corporate earnings, but negative GDP was fueled by a surge in imports. Powell may address whether this is a technical or cyclical issue. Trump's criticism and pressure on Powell are also being closely watched, with markets discounting the possibility of Powell being fired. Kalshi betting odds indicate only a 13% chance of Powell's dismissal. Markets are eagerly awaiting Powell's comments during the press conference.
news.headline: Fed likely to maintain interest rates, with focus on Powell's messaging on tariffs, inflation, and GDP. Market eyes incoming 2025 updates, with a 13% chance of Powell dismissal.

news.summary: Premarket trading saw Howard Hughes Holdings Inc. (NYSE: HHH) shares rise due to a $900 million agreement with Pershing Square to acquire 9,000,000 new HHH shares. The acquisition price of $100 per share represents a 48% premium over the May 2, 2025, closing price. Post-investment, Pershing Square will hold 46.9% of HHH shares but limit voting power to 40% and beneficial ownership to 47%. This move allows HHH to branch into a holding company, gaining controlling stakes in operating firms, in addition to their real estate focus. For the complete report, check Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Pershing Square invests $900 million in Howard Hughes, acquiring 9,000,000 shares at $100 each, a 48% premium.

news.summary: In April, truckload freight volumes saw a decline in Beaverton, Oregon. Data from DAT Freight & Analytics pointed towards factors such as tariff-related stockpiling, a manufacturing slowdown, and seasonal changes affecting demand for trucking services. The DAT Truckload Volume Index (TVI) for van and reefer freight dropped slightly, with the Van TVI at 287, down 0.3% from the previous month, and the Refrigerated TVI also experiencing a decrease.
news.headline: Truckload volumes and rates dropped in April due to reduced demand, with Van TVI at 287 (down 0.3%) and Reefer TVI: [missing number].

news.summary: The annual Milken Institute conference will bring together prominent figures from Wall Street and senior officials of the Trump administration. A major focus of discussions will be on President Trump's management of the U.S. financial markets.
news.headline: Wall Street elites meet in Beverly Hills for Milken Institute conference discussing Trump's impact on US financial markets.

news.summary: Nodal Clear, based in Washington, has revealed its clearing support for the trading of specific cryptocurrency futures contracts on the Coinbase Derivatives Exchange around the clock. This service commences from today, enabling traders to engage in 24x7 trading activities.
news.headline: Nodal Clear enables 24x7 trading on Coinbase Derivatives Exchange for select crypto futures contracts.

news.summary: Tesla's stock has experienced a decline this year, with investors showing signs of renewed confidence after Elon Musk's Q1 earnings call presentation. As concerns arise over Musk's involvement with the Trump White House, the question arises: Is Tesla stock a prudent investment decision amidst these changes?
news.headline: Investors gaining confidence in Tesla as stock is down this year. Elon Musk stepping back from Trump's White House.

news.summary: In Monaco on May 7, 2025, Costamare Inc. (NYSE:CMRE) disclosed that it successfully executed the separation of its dry bulk sector, forming a new independent entity known as Costamare Bulkers Holdings Limited. As part of this spin-off, existing Costamare Inc. shareholders were granted one common share of Costamare Bulkers Holdings Limited for every five Costamare Inc. common shares they possessed as of the market closing on April 29, 2025.
news.headline: Costamare Inc. completes spin-off of dry bulk business, creating Costamare Bulkers Holdings Limited. Shareholders received 1 share for every 5 held.

news.summary: A Florida-based company, TSOLife, has successfully raised a significant $43 million in a Series B investment round. The funding aims to revolutionize senior living communities by leveraging person-centered data and artificial intelligence tools. This substantial investment marks a major milestone for TSOLife as it seeks to enhance the quality of life for seniors through innovative technologies.
news.headline: TSOLife receives $43M Series B funding to revolutionize Senior Living with AI and data tools.

news.summary: Shares of GEO Group, Inc. (NYSE: GEO) are down as the company reported first-quarter revenue of $604.6 million, falling short of the expected $611.81 million consensus. Adjusted EBITDA decreased to $99.8 million from $117.6 million compared to the previous year. Adjusted EPS of 14 cents also missed expectations of 18 cents. The company saw a $5 million increase in general and administrative expenses. Net debt at the end of the quarter stood at approximately $1.68 billion, with $65 million in cash and cash equivalents. George C. Zoley, Executive Chairman of GEO, mentioned the approval of contracts for two facilities with 2,800 beds, translating to over $130 million in annualized revenues.
news.headline: GEO Group missed Q1 revenue targets with $604.6M, Adjusted EBITDA declined to $99.8M & net debt was at $1.68B.EPS at 14 cents, below consensus of 18 cents.

news.summary: The article discusses four major issues affecting the market; Indian missile strikes on Pakistan, formal talks between the US and China, the Fed's rate decision, and China's move to replace the dollar with yuan. The chart of gold ETF SPDR Gold Trust (NYSE: GLD) is used as an indicator for investors on these issues. Despite tensions between India and Pakistan, gold prices remain stable, indicating market belief in de-escalation. Similarly, despite positive trade talks between the US and China, gold prices do not collapse, suggesting low expectations for significant outcomes. The article emphasizes the importance of understanding investor positioning for gaining an edge in the market.
news.headline: Indian missiles hit Pakistan; U.S.-China talks begin; Fed's rate decision imminent. Gold remains stable amid tensions.

news.summary: Jerome Powell, the Federal Reserve Chair, is not expected to decrease interest rates today, but there is a possibility of a rate cut in the near future. Powell faces a challenging situation where any decision he makes will be difficult.
news.headline: Fed Chair Jerome Powell faces pressure to cut interest rates but won't do so now. The dilemma looms as economic concerns persist.

news.summary: In a recent development, it has been reported that the current unemployment rate in the country has risen to 6.5%, with approximately 9 million people currently out of work. This increase represents a significant jump from the previous month's rate of 5.8%. The data also shows that the number of new jobless claims has reached 450,000, indicating a worrying trend in the labor market. Experts attribute this spike in unemployment to the ongoing economic challenges facing the nation, including the impact of the global pandemic. Efforts are being made to address this issue and support those affected by the rise in joblessness.
news.headline: Large tariffs proposed by Trump are so significant that a 10% tariff decrease feels like a relief. #TradeWar

news.summary: Inspira™ Technologies OXY B.H.N. Ltd., a leading company in life-support and diagnostic technologies traded on NASDAQ as IINN, based in Ra'anana, Israel, made an announcement on May 7, 2025. The company revealed that Israel's primary healthcare provider has given approval for the clinical validation of their INSPIRA™ ART100 device. This validation will be conducted by prominent physicians who plan to utilize the innovative life-support and diagnostic equipment during organ transplant surgeries. In a significant step forward, Inspira will be introducing the FDA-approved INSPIRA ART100 system at a distinguished medical facility in Israel, affiliated with the country's largest healthcare provider.
news.headline: Israel's largest healthcare provider approves Inspira Technologies' ART100 system for organ transplant patients. Deployment at a renowned medical center for clinical validation. FDA approved.

news.summary: Miami startup Kind Designs, known for 3D-Printing the pioneering Living Seawalls™, has completed its Seed 1 funding round with Overlay Capital leading the investment. The round amassed $5 million, valuing the company at $30 million, and saw continued support from prominent investors in construction, government, and infrastructure industries. Entrepreneur Mark Cuban reinforced his initial investment in the company. Previously, in 2024, Kind Designs secured $6.5 million in funding during its Seed round, valuing the company at $18 million. The success of Kind Designs has attracted interest from diverse sectors, showcasing the potential of the company.
news.headline: Mark Cuban invests $5M as Kind Designs closes Seed 1 round at $30M valuation for Living Seawalls. Cuban doubled initial investment.

news.summary: A recent report revealed that the unemployment rate in the United States dropped to 3.8%, indicating a decrease of 0.2% from the previous month. Additionally, the economy added 250,000 jobs, exceeding initial predictions by 20,000. This positive trend in job growth has been attributed to various sectors, with notable increases in construction, healthcare, and manufacturing industries. The report also highlighted a rise in average hourly earnings by 3.2% compared to the previous year. Experts believe that these figures indicate a strong and stable labor market in the country.
news.headline: Market rally stalls before US-China talks: Stocks fall, global indexes down, investors cautious.

news.summary: Powercast Corporation, a leader in wireless charging solutions, won top honors for their RFID-powered sensor monitoring system designed for data center equipment. The system operates without wires or batteries and received recognition on May 9, 2025, in Pittsburgh. This innovative technology is customized for monitoring data center equipment and is expected to revolutionize the industry.
news.headline: Powercast wins Best New Product at RFID Journal LIVE for battery-free sensor monitoring system, tailored for data centers.

news.summary: Protagonist Therapeutics Inc. and Johnson & Johnson have unveiled fresh clinical data from the Phase 3 ICONIC-TOTAL examination of icotrokinra for scalp and genital psoriasis. Noteworthy results from the skin sites section unveiled that by the 16th week, 57% of patients under once daily icotrokinra obtained the primary endpoint based on the Investigator's Global Assessment (IGA) score of 0/1, signifying clear or near-clear skin, with a ≥2-grade enhancement from the baseline at Week 16, while only 6% of patients on placebo achieved the same. Additionally, 66% of individuals with scalp psoriasis reached a scalp-specific Investigator's Global Assessment (ss-IGA) score of 0/1 compared to the 11% on placebo after 16 weeks. Furthermore, a notable 77% of patients with genital psoriasis received a static Physician's Global Assessment of... (the remaining details are accessible on Benzinga.com).
news.headline: Protagonist & Johnson & Johnson's drug showed skin clearance success in psoriasis study. 57% vs. 6% in treatment vs. placebo achieved clear skin at week 16. Scalp psoriasis success was at 66% vs. 11%, and genital psoriasis success was at 77%.

news.summary: Cambio, a reputable AI-driven commercial real estate operations platform, has revealed on May 9, 2025, in New York that they are the primary choice for industry professionals due to their commitment to providing uninterrupted access to crucial energy data and analytics. This platform is considered a reliable source by many, with a significant number of users relying on it for their commercial real estate needs.
news.headline: Cambio Vault offers free backup for ENERGY STAR Portfolio Manager data amid EPA program uncertainty. Industry-trusted platform safeguards critical energy info.

news.summary: In Ferndale, Michigan on May 9, 2025, drivers and fillers employed by Airgas and represented by Teamsters Local 283 are demanding a fair contract. They have unanimously voted to authorize a strike as a result of the company's continuous failure to provide a satisfactory agreement. The workers are prepared to take action to ensure their demands are met.
news.headline: Teamsters at Airgas in Ferndale, MI authorize strike due to lack of fair contract offer, all drivers and fillers on board.

news.summary: Shares of Pinterest and Lyft have surged on the stock market due to increased competition in their respective industries. Pinterest's stock rose by 5%, reaching a new high of $80 per share. Lyft also experienced a notable increase of 4% in their share price, now standing at $60 per share. On the other hand, Expedia and Affirm saw a decline in their stock values. Expedia’s shares decreased by 3% to $110 per share, while Affirm witnessed a drop of 2%, settling at $70 per share. This stock movement reflects the ongoing dynamics within the tech and transportation sectors.
news.headline: Pinterest and Lyft stocks rise due to competition; Expedia and Affirm stocks decline. Find more on Bloomberg.com.

news.summary: The Metropolitan Police has reported that an estimated sum exceeding $20 million of stolen funds has been orchestrated to pass through a network of shell companies for laundering.
news.headline: Three individuals arrested by UK Police in connection with a $20M crypto scam; accused of laundering stolen funds through shell companies.

news.summary: In Toronto, a new bill titled Bill 5, Protect Ontario by Unleashing our Economy Act, 2025, introduced by the Ford Conservatives, has raised concerns. This proposed law challenges workers' rights by potentially removing health and safety regulations, minimum wage guarantees, and employment safeguards. Under this legislation, employees may face limited options for recourse in cases of workplace injuries, termination, or mistreatment. The bill, currently in its second reading in the Ontario legislative process, specifically addresses these issues in Schedule 9, impacting the livelihoods of Ontarians. If passed, it could change the landscape for workers by eliminating key protections that have thus far been integral to their work environments.
news.headline: CUPE Ontario warns of Ford's Bill 5 bringing US-style labor practices to Ontario, removing worker protections.
